title: Suggested Learning Resource Pathways
description: A flowchart illustrating the recommended sequence and relationships between different types of learning resources for Module 5: Human-Centred AI.
relationships: Core Readings provide the foundation for all other resources
Video Lectures build conceptual understanding from the core readings
Case Studies apply concepts from readings and lectures to real-world scenarios
Interactive Tools allow for hands-on practice with concepts from all previous resources
Academic Papers offer deeper dives into specific topics introduced in earlier resources
Community Forums connect all learning paths for discussion and support
